summary_ko: 일반 문서는 로컬에서 추출하고 보호되었거나 로컬 해석이 불가능한 파일만 DRM API에 전달해 평문을 LLM 없이 출력합니다.
configuration_required: Choose auto, always DRM, or DRM bypass processing mode. Auto performs local-first extraction.
Enter the approved DRM text API URL, Bearer token, employee number, and exact allowed host when DRM calls may occur.
Keep HTTPS and TLS verification enabled unless the approved closed test network only supports HTTP.
Confirm that the DRM API returns plain text for each enabled document or image format, including OCR text for images when required.
